alerts.title: Added: Codex Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Manual review required. Automated extraction failed: {"error":{"code":503,"message":"This model is currently experiencing high demand. Spikes in demand are usually temporary. Please try again later.","status":"UNAVAILABLE"}}

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General Labelling Requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 9:2022. This technical regulation covers general labelling requirements for pre-packaged food, which would include allergen declaration, applicable to seasoning and snack products.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory Shelf Life Periods
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 150-1:2013. This technical regulation specifies mandatory shelf life periods for food products, applicable to seasoning, snack, and other processed foods.

alerts.title: Added: India Allergen List - Mandatory declaration of allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per FSSAI Labelling and Display Regulations. Specific allergens requiring mandatory declaration on food labels, including for seasoning and snack products, must be verified against the detailed FSSAI Labelling and Display Regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Toxic or harmful substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited, unless specified by MHLW as unlikely to cause harm to human health. This applies to all food and additives meant for sale.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - Pathogens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited if contaminated with pathogens or suspected to be so, and likely to cause harm to human health. This applies to all food and additives meant for sale.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: All food businesses must comply with regulatory limits..

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food products containing non-permitted additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Do not import or sell..

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (incidental constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be within SFA’s regulatory limits..

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Food products containing contaminants exceeding regulatory limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Do not import or sell..

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Incidental constituents (contaminants)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: All food businesses must comply with regulatory limits..

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Residues of diethylstibestrol, hexoestrol, dienoestrol
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited.. Applies to meat and any food derived from meat.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Food product labelling
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must comply with labelling requirements..

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared in the list of ingredients on food labels.. Applies to prepacked foods for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Modified: Taiwan Allergen List - Crustacean shellfish, mango, peanuts, sesame seeds, milk and goat milk, eggs, tree nuts, gluten-containing cereals, soybeans, fish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. New: Mandatory declaration. These 10 allergens require mandatory labeling if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Modified: Taiwan Allergen List - Sulphite (as residue sulphur dioxide)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: 10 or more. New: 10 or more. Mandatory labeling if sulphite residue sulphur dioxide is 10 mg/kg or more.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Additive Limits - Permitted/Non-permitted Ingredients
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required for the list of permitted and non-permitted ingredients. Regulations specify permitted and non-permitted ingredients in food.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Contaminant Limits - Contaminants
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required against specific standards. Food standards exist for contaminants.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Contaminant Limits - Maximum Residue Limits (MRLs)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required against the ASEAN MRLs list. The updated ASEAN MRLs list was published in February 2026.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Contaminant Limits - Toxins and Veterinary Drug Residues
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required against specific standards. Food standards exist for toxins and veterinary drug residues.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Microbiology Limits - Pathogenic Microorganisms
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required against specific standards. Food standards exist for pathogenic microorganisms.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited or delisted substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. Prohibited substances are listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189). Delisted color additives are in FDA regulations (21 CFR 81.10 and/or 81.30). Verification against the inventory is required.

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The 9 major food allergens recognized by the U.S. are milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, and sesame.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - 3-Monochloropropane-1,2-Diol (3-MCPD)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 1. Guidance level for 3-MCPD in acid-hydrolyzed protein and Asian-style sauces.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. Action level for total aflatoxins in general foods.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. Action level for total aflatoxins in peanuts and peanut products.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen cross-contact and undeclared allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The CGMP & PC rule (21 CFR part 117) establishes requirements for allergen preventive controls to prevent allergen cross-contact and undeclared allergens. Facilities must put written procedures in place.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. Cochineal extract and carmine must be declared on the label of all food and cosmetic products.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. All products containing FD&C Yellow No. 5 must identify it on their labels.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Gluten-Free claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The FDA issued a final rule defining “gluten-free” for food labeling. Compliance requirements for fermented and hydrolyzed foods bearing the “gluten-free” claim were issued on August 12, 2020.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Major Food Allergen Declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. Food labels must identify the food source of all major food allergens. This can be done in parentheses following the ingredient name (e.g., 'lecithin (soy)') or in a 'contains' statement immediately after or next to the ingredient list (e.g., 'Contains wheat, milk, and soy.').

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Specific Allergen Declaration (Tree Nuts, Fish, Crustacean Shellfish)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The specific type of tree nut (e.g., almonds, pecans, walnuts), and the species of fish (e.g., bass, flounder, cod) and Crustacean shellfish (e.g., crab, lobster, shrimp) must be declared.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting agents
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10. Various sulfiting agents must be declared on food labels when present in food at a concentration of ≥10 parts per million total sulfites.

alerts.title: Added: China Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This standard specifies the varieties, scope of use, and maximum usage levels of food additives in China. Specific limits must be verified against the full text of GB 2760-2015.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via GSFA online database. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.details: Old: Maximum levels (MLs) or guideline levels must be adhered to. Verification required via relevant Codex texts/standards.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins, metals (arsenic, lead, mercury), radionuclides
alerts.details: Old: Maximum levels (MLs) must be adhered to. Verification required via relevant Codex texts/standards.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of approved food additives and their conditions of use is required via the EU Additives Database and Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against Union list. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of food safety criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins, and metabolites is required as laid down in Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General Requirements for Halal Food
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 2055-1:2015. This technical regulation specifies general requirements for Halal food, which may include specific labelling for Halal certification.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General requirements for sports nutritional foods
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 2209:2026. This technical regulation covers general requirements for sports nutritional foods, which are a type of processed food.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Optional Shelf Life Periods
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 150-2:2013. This standard specifies optional shelf life periods for food products, applicable to seasoning, snack, and other processed foods.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for pre-packaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: Old: Verification of GSO 9:2022 is required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Halal food general requirements (for products making a Halal claim)
alerts.details: Old: Verification of GSO 2055-1:2015 is required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life declaration
alerts.details: Old: Verification of GSO 150-1:2013 is required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Optional shelf life declaration
alerts.details: Old: Verification of GSO 150-2:2013 is required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Labelling requirements
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific labelling requirements for prepackaged food stuffs must be verified by consulting the full GSO 9:2022 technical regulation.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - General requirements for Halal food
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Voluntary expiration dates
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological limits
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific microbiological limits for various foodstuffs and food ingredients must be verified by consulting the full GSO 1016:2015 technical regulation.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological criteria
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: India Additive Limits - Permitted food additives and their maximum limits
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per FSSAI Food Additives Regulations. Specific additive limits for various food categories, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified against the detailed schedules within the FSSAI Food Additives Regulations.

alerts.title: Added: India Labelling Requirement - General labelling and display requirements for pre-packaged food
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per FSSAI Labelling and Display Regulations. All general labelling and display requirements for pre-packaged food, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified against the detailed FSSAI Labelling and Display Regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Additive Limits - Dinitrogen Monoksida (N2O)
alerts.details: New: Verification required for specific production, import, registration, and circulation conditions. This circular specifies the requirements for the production, import, registration, and circulation of Dinitrogen Monoksida (N2O) as a food additive. Specific limits and conditions must be verified by consulting the full regulation.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Additive Limits - All food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Additive Limits - Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Allergen List - Allergen declaration
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Contaminant Limits - All chemical contaminants
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Compliance for imported food
alerts.details: New: Verification required for specific surveillance requirements, including compliance with Indonesian food safety and labeling standards. This regulation outlines the surveillance requirements for imported food, ensuring compliance with national standards, which would encompass additive limits, contaminant limits, and labeling for products like seasoning and snacks.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food Categories
alerts.details: New: Verification required for specific food categorization. This regulation defines the food categories used by BPOM, which is fundamental for applying specific regulations related to additives, contaminants, and labeling for processed foods, including seasoning and snack products.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - General compliance for processed foods
alerts.details: New: Verification required for specific regulations pertaining to additives, microbiology, contaminants, salt/sodium, allergens, and labeling. The JDIH BPOM website lists 281 regulations specifically for 'Pangan Olahan' (Processed Foods). Manufacturers and importers must verify compliance with these regulations for all relevant aspects, including additive limits, microbiology, contaminants, salt/sodium, allergens, and labeling for seasoning and snack products.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food categorization
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Labelling warnings
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Microbiology Limits - All microbiological contaminants
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Salt / Sodium Limits - Salt / Sodium
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Ingredients of food or additives, and methods of production, processing, use, cooking, or preservation
alerts.details: New: Must conform to standards and criteria established by the Minister of Health, Labour and Welfare. Verification of MHLW's standards and criteria is required.. These are general standards and criteria for food and additives.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Permitted Additives
alerts.details: New: Only additives (excluding natural flavoring agents and generally consumed substances used as additives) specified by MHLW as unlikely to cause harm are permitted. Verification of MHLW's positive list is required.. This establishes a positive list system for food additives.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Additive Limits - Additives (excluding natural flavoring agents and generally consumed substances used as additives)
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited unless MHLW specifies as unlikely to cause harm. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Additive Limits - Food and Additives
alerts.details: Old: Must conform to MHLW established criteria for production, processing, use, cooking, preservation methods, and standards for ingredients. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Residues of agricultural chemicals, feed additives, and pharmaceuticals for animals
alerts.details: New: Must not exceed quantities specified by the Minister of Health, Labour and Welfare as unlikely to cause harm. Verification of MHLW's specified limits/standards is required.. This refers to the Positive List System for Agricultural Chemical Residues in Food.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Contamination or foreign substances
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited if likely to cause harm to human health. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Residues of agricultural chemicals, feed additives, or pharmaceuticals for animals
alerts.details: Old: Must not exceed MHLW-specified quantities. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Toxic or harmful substances
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited, unless MHLW specifies as unlikely to cause harm. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Labelling and advertising of food or additives
alerts.details: New: Must conform to standards and criteria established by the Minister of Health, Labour and Welfare. Verification of MHLW's standards and criteria is required.. This covers general labelling and advertising requirements.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Labelling Requirement - Designated ingredients, etc. (MHLW-designated ingredients requiring special attention)
alerts.details: Old: Business operators must notify authorities without delay if food containing designated ingredients causes or may cause harm. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Labelling Requirement - Imported food and additives requiring certification of food sanitation management at production site
alerts.details: Old: Must have certificates from exporting country's governmental organization. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.
